case_title: YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC. VS. SOMA NETWORKS, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC.
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOMA NETWORKS, INC., A CORPORATION $13,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,030.55 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,960.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA NETWORKS, INC., A CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2011
NON SERVICE/RETURN FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC.
DECLARATION REGARDING CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANKEE GROUP RESEARCH, INC. SERVED OCT-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA NETWORKS, INC., A CORPORATION

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $430.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA NETWORKS, INC., A CORPORATION
